Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Manufacturer_Resources.asp

# SBDC Manufacturers Resource Hub

## Resource type
Manufacturing resource hub.

## Resource summary
Use for Southeast Texas manufacturers needing support centers, economic development and regional growth resources, workforce/training, innovation hubs/makerspaces, national associations, and manufacturing software/tools.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
